callbackUrl.label: Callback URL
callbackUrl.help: Detections are POSTed here per frame: { app, room, ts, detections }.

model.label: Model size
model.help: Bigger = more accurate but slower. Nano/Small suit CPU hosts.

cuda.label: Use CUDA (GPU)
cuda.help: On uses the GPU; off runs on CPU. Leave it off on CPU-only hosts.

fps.label: Sample FPS
fps.help: Frames per second to sample (lower = less CPU).

classes.label: Classes filter
classes.help: Pick the COCO classes to detect. None selected = all 80.
